name: libclass-load-xs-perl
title: libclass-load-xs-perl
summary: XS implementation of parts of Class::Load
description:
XS implementation of parts of Class::Load
Class::Load::XS provides an XS implementation for portions of Class::Load, a
module that provides several functions to load classes at runtime.
.
See Class::Load in the libclass-load-perl package for API details.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libclass-load-xs-perl because XS implementation of parts of Class::Load.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libclass-load-xs-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libclass-load-xs-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libclass-load-xs-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
